title: How Reliable Is Explainable AI for Plant Disease Recognition? A Robustness Evaluation under Real-World Image Transformations
description: Reproducible code, data pipeline, and paper for a benchmark of CAM-based explanation robustness (Grad-CAM, Grad-CAM++, Score-CAM, Eigen-CAM, Layer-CAM) for plant-disease CNNs under realistic, label-preserving image perturbations (blur, rotation, brightness, noise) on the leaf-split PlantVillage dataset. Includes a fine-tuned (98.9% accuracy) validation showing that explanation fragility worsens toward deployment accuracy, a Score-CAM weighting diagnosis, and a class-sensitivity control. CSoNet 2026.
